---
title: "UKB chr1 Dense Store — Array Query API Benchmark"
subtitle: "chr1 × 100 UKB analyses · sparse flat array return contract"
date: today
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 3
    embed-resources: true
---

## Dataset

| Field | Value |
|---|---:|
| Variants (hg38) | 762,080 |
| Analyses | 100 |
| Store size | 290.0 MB |
| Build time | 388.5s |
| Liftover failures | 0 |
| Store path | `docs/benchmark-output/vcf_ukb_chr1_dense.opengwasdb` |

## Query API

All five query methods return `dict[str, np.ndarray]` with four parallel sparse
flat arrays (`variant_index`, `analysis_index`, `z`, `se`), matching the format
of the internal top-hit index. `AssociationResult` Python object materialisation
is completely eliminated.

## Timings

Each pattern ran 10 repetitions after one warm-up call.
Row API column shows the previous `AssociationResult` baseline for comparison.
besdq column is the besdq zarr `zstd_bitshuffle` baseline.

| Query | Median ms | p95 ms | Result count | Row API ms | Speedup | besdq ms | vs besdq |
|---|---:|---:|---:|---:|---:|---:|---:|
| regional | 97.6 | 130.4 | 324,048 | 2800.805 | 28.7× | 4.988 | 19.6× ⚠ |
| phewas | 2.6 | 3.0 | 100 | 5.556 | 2.1× | 0.906 | 2.9× ⚠ |
| tophits | 1.3 | 1.4 | 14,557 | 161.364 | 124.1× | 0.688 | 1.9× |
| bulk | 1764.2 | 2802.6 | 762,080 | 13671.501 | 7.8× | 490.517 | 3.6× ⚠ |
| random_lookup | 224.2 | 298.4 | 598 | 375.622 | 1.7× | 30.424 | 7.4× ⚠ |

## Interpretation

- **regional**: 28.7× faster than row API (2800.8 ms → 97.6 ms)
- WARNING: 19.6× slower than besdq zstd_bitshuffle baseline.
- **phewas**: 2.1× faster than row API (5.6 ms → 2.6 ms)
- WARNING: 2.9× slower than besdq zstd_bitshuffle baseline.
- **tophits**: 124.1× faster than row API (161.4 ms → 1.3 ms)
- **bulk**: 7.8× faster than row API (13671.5 ms → 1764.2 ms)
- WARNING: 3.6× slower than besdq zstd_bitshuffle baseline.
- **random_lookup**: 1.7× faster than row API (375.6 ms → 224.2 ms)
- WARNING: 7.4× slower than besdq zstd_bitshuffle baseline.

## Provenance

- JSON results: `opengwasdb_vcf_ukb_chr1_array_benchmark.json`
- Row-API baseline: `/home/gh13047/repo/opengwasdb/docs/benchmark-output/vcf_ukb_chr1_dense.opengwasdb`
- besdq baseline: `ukb-chr1_zarr_benchmark.json`
